_comment: Shared base for variable templates. Variable JSONs can set "extends": "variable_base" and will be deep-merged with this object (template wins).

create_variable.description: Create a new variable using this template

app_id.description: UUID of your Piwik PRO app

variable_type.description: Must match this template (e.g. constant, data_layer, custom_javascript, dom_element)

value.description: Template-specific value (static value, data layer path, JavaScript code, or selector)

options.description: Reserved for future enhancements; leave empty unless instructed by Piwik PRO support

update_variable.description: Update an existing variable - only editable fields will be processed

app_id.description: UUID of your Piwik PRO app

variable_id.description: UUID of the variable to update

name.description: Updated descriptive name for the variable

value.description: Updated value (interpretation depends on variable type)

options.description: Reserved for future enhancements; leave empty unless instructed by Piwik PRO support

name.recommendation: Use clear, descriptive names that indicate the variable's purpose

template.edit_note: ⚠️ Cannot be changed after creation - template determines variable behavior

options.description: Optional configuration object. Leave empty unless Piwik PRO introduces additional capabilities.
options.recommendation: Do not include custom keys—passing additional properties is rejected by the API.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the variable was created
created_at.edit_note: 🚫 Automatically set by the API, cannot be modified

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the variable was last updated
updated_at.edit_note: 🚫 Automatically updated by the API on changes

field_mutability_guide.description: Understanding field editability after variable creation

editable.description: ✅ Can be updated anytime after creation

create-only.description: ⚠️ Set during creation, immutable after creation
create-only.explanation: Template determines the variable type and behavior - cannot be changed to maintain data integrity

read-only.explanation: System timestamps managed automatically by Piwik PRO
